2605.26013.title: AdvantageFlow: Advantage-Weighted Least Squares for RL in Flow Models
2605.26013.paper_summary: We introduce AdvantageFlow, a forward-process reinforcement learning algorithm for rectified flow models. Unlike Flow-GRPO, which optimizes the reverse process, we optimize an advantage-weighted forward-process prediction loss. This optimization problem is unstable when advantages are negative and the loss becomes non-convex. We stabilize it by rollout policy regularization, which reduces variance and arises from fitting a local reward-improving target distribution. We evaluate AdvantageFlow on image generation tasks with Stable Diffusion 3.5 Medium. It outperforms both Flow-GRPO and a state-of-the-art forward-process RL baseline based on negative-aware fine-tuning.
2605.26013.paper_summary_zh: 我們介紹 AdvantageFlow，一種用於修正流模型的前向過程強化學習算法。與優化反向過程的 Flow-GRPO 不同，我們優化一個優勢加權的前向過程預測損失。當優勢為負時，這個優化問題是不穩定的，損失變得非凸。我們通過回合政策正則化來穩定它，這減少了方差，並源於擬合一個局部獎勵提升的目標分佈。我們在使用 Stable Diffusion 3.5 Medium 的圖像生成任務上評估 AdvantageFlow。它的表現超越了 Flow-GRPO 和基於負面認知微調的最先進前向過程 RL 基準。
2605.26013.author: Branislav Kveton et.al.
2605.26013.authors: Branislav Kveton, Anup Rao, Subhojyoti Mukherjee, Krishna Kumar Singh, Viet Dac Lai
